caption:
They track clicks, habits, and patterns like it’s normal.

I’m not hiding anything. I just don’t want to be watched 24/7.
So I switched to Freedom DNS.

One tap and my internet stays fast, private, and under my control.
No complicated setup. No paranoia. Just boundaries.

If you care about digital freedom, start with your connection.

#privacy #digitalfreedom #dns #cyberhygiene #mobilesecurity
title: Freedom DNS - Stay Ahead
